mapper.delete:
delete from emp where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (CASE job WHEN 1 THEN 'head teacher' WHEN 2 THEN 'lecturer' WHEN 3 THEN 'Student Affairs Supervisor' WHEN 4 THEN 'Teaching and Research Supervisor' WHEN 5 THEN 'Consultant' ELSE 'other' END) AS pos, COUNT(*) AS num from emp GROUP BY job ORDER BY num;
SELECT IF(gender = 1, 'male', 'female') AS name, count(*) AS value FROM emp GROUP BY gender;
SELECT id, username, name, gender, image, job, salary, dept_id, entry_date, create_time, update_time FROM emp
